title: Contact Modal for Refunds Policy Page

stories.title: Create ContactModal component
acceptanceCriteria: Modal has Email input field with placeholder 'Whats your e-mail'
Modal has Message textarea with placeholder 'Type your message...'
Modal has 'Send your Message' button styled like original
Modal has close button (X) in top-right corner
Modal has title 'Contact us' and subtitle matching original

stories.title: Wire modal to RefundsPolicyPage
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'contact us' link on /legal/refunds-policy opens the ContactModal
Modal opens as overlay with semi-transparent dark background
Clicking close button or backdrop closes the modal
Link prevents default navigation (stays on page)

stories.title: Ensure modal styling matches original
acceptanceCriteria: Modal card has rounded corners and white/light purple background
Input fields have purple-tinted styling matching screenshot
Button has purple gradient matching site design
Close button is circular with X icon in top-right
